title: callitriche palustris var. minima
intro: Callitriche palustris var. minima, also known as least water-starwort, is a small aquatic plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The plant contains compounds that have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as gastritis and diarrhea. Herbal preparations of Callitriche palustris var. minima can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation.
